meaning: n.[药]氯地米松,倍氯米松(一种用于治疗气喘的吸入剂)
examples: A comparison of once-daily triamcinolone acetonide aqueous and twice-daily beclomethasone dipropionate aqueous nasal sprays in the treatment of seasonal allergic rhinitis.
Oral prolonged release beclomethasone dipropionate and prednisone in the treatment of active ulcerative colitis: results from a double-blind, randomized, parallel group study.
Objective To study the characteristics of pulmonary distribution and clearance of beclomethasone dipropionate(BDP) nano-microcapsule and its lung deposition and slow-releasing effects.
